Control_Description: Manages the creation and maintenance of user accounts
Establishes and administers privileged user accounts using role-based access schemes
Enforces approved authorizations for controlling the flow of information within the system and between interconnected systems
Restricts privileged accounts on the information system to authorized personnel
Determines that the information system is capable of auditing specified events
Ensures that audit records contain information that establishes what type of event occurred when and where
Alerts in the event of an audit processing failure

Control_Name: Audit Review Analysis and Reporting | Central Review and Analysis
Control_Description: Provides the capability to centrally review and analyze audit records from multiple components

Control_Name: Audit Generation | System-Wide / Time-Correlated Audit Trail
Control_Description: Compiles audit records from across the system into a system-wide audit trail
Prevents program execution in accordance with organizationally defined policies

Control_Name: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users) | Network Access to Privileged Accounts
Control_Description: Implements multifactor authentication for network access to privileged accounts

Control_Name: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users) | Network Access to Non-Privileged Accounts
Control_Description: Implements multifactor authentication for network access to non-privileged accounts

Control_Name: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users) | Remote Access - Separate Device
Control_Description: Implements multifactor authentication for remote access using a separate device
Manages information system authenticators
Enforces password-based authentication requirements
Monitors and controls communications at the external boundary and key internal boundaries
Limits the number of external network connections to the information system
Protects the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information

Control_Name: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity | Cryptographic or Alternate Physical Protection
Control_Description: Implements cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure and detect changes during transmission
Establishes and manages cryptographic keys
Implements required cryptography in accordance with applicable laws and policies
Protects the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest

Control_Name: Protection of Information at Rest | Cryptographic Protection
Control_Description: Implements cryptographic mechanisms to prevent unauthorized disclosure and modification of information at rest
Identifies reports and corrects information system flaws
Implements malicious code protection mechanisms
Monitors the information system to detect attacks and indicators of potential attacks
Alerts when indications of compromise or potential compromise occur
